pr.title: [Non-Record] JEPA Self-Distillation with EMA Target Encoder for Autoregressive LM (val_bpb: 1.19) | Current Noisy/Negative Result

output.summary: Adds JEPA-style EMA target encoder self-distillation aux loss to a causal transformer, pairing predictor MLP forecasts with VICReg-regularized latents alongside CE training.
techniques: EMA target encoder providing slowly evolving latent targets
Predictor MLP forecasting next-token representations for JEPA loss
VICReg applied to target latents to prevent collapse
